message:
feat(demo): app infrastructure, chrome, and theme updates

App structure:
- Cargo.toml: Updated dependencies for new features
- app.rs: New screen integrations and app state enhancements
- cli.rs: CLI help text updates for new screens

Chrome:
- chrome.rs: Significant chrome enhancements (+283 lines)
  - New screen accent colors
  - Improved navigation chrome
  - Status bar updates

Theme:
- theme.rs: Theme system expansion with new color tokens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,6 +46,9 @@ SCREENS:
    19  Text Editor        Advanced multi-line text editor with search
    20  Mouse Playground   Mouse hit-testing and interaction demo
    21  Form Validation    Comprehensive form validation demo
+   22  Virtualized Search Fuzzy search in 100K+ items demo
+   23  Async Tasks        Async task manager with retry and cancellation
+   24  Theme Studio       Live palette editor and theme inspector
 
 KEYBINDINGS:
     1-9, 0          Switch to screens 1-10 by number
